channel.title: Frontity in 2022
channel.description: Hello guys, is it worth starting and investing time in the project anymore? I wanted to dive into headless wp with my agency using react in order to be familiar for going to native after. During my search of Gatsby, next etc I saw frontity and I thought that's it! Wordpress, react, framework using both and made especially for this purpose. As I was reading the docs and frontity talks I understood that the project is kinda abandoned by the core team. And here I am to ask, is it worth to invest here? Could we keep using this framework? It seemed so promising. What's your advice for someone that just started studying it? Thanks in advance.

item.title: Frontity in 2022
item.dc:creator: charisvaltzis
item.description:
Hello guys, is it worth starting and investing time in the project anymore? I wanted to dive into headless wp with my agency using react in order to be familiar for going to native after. During my search of Gatsby, next etc I saw frontity and I thought that’s it! Wordpress, react, framework using both and made especially for this purpose. As I was reading the docs and frontity talks I understood that the project is kinda abandoned by the core team. And here I am to ask, is it worth to invest here? Could we keep using this framework? It seemed so promising. What’s your advice for someone that just started studying it? Thanks in advance.

Read full topic
